{"credits": [{"type": "analyst", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/37411315?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/vladko312", "id": 37411315, "login": "vladko312", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjM3NDExMzE1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/vladko312", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-46640", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:L/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}], "description": "### Description

The `obj.(expr)` dynamic-attribute syntax (added in 3.15.0 as the replacement for the deprecated `attribute()` function) lets the attribute be an arbitrary expression. When the receiver is `_self` (or any `{% import %}` alias) and the parenthesised expression is a string literal, `DotExpressionParser` short-circuits to the macro-call path and concatenates the attacker-controlled string into a `MacroReferenceExpression` name with no identifier validation. `MacroReferenceExpression::compile()` then emits that name raw into the generated PHP source.

An attacker who can supply template source can inject arbitrary PHP into the compiled template and execute it at template-load time, before `checkSecurity()` is ever called. This is a complete bypass of `SandboxExtension`, including a globally-enabled sandbox with an empty `SecurityPolicy` allowlist.

### Resolution

The parser now validates that the dynamic attribute resolves to a valid macro identifier before routing through `MacroReferenceExpression`, and the macro-reference compiler emits the name through a properly escaped path.

### Credits

Twig would like to thank Claude Mythos Preview (via Project Glasswing) for reporting the issue and providing the fix.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00405, "percentile": 0.32729}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-21T21:31:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-46640"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-21T21:31:08Z", "references": ["https://github.com/twigphp/Twig/security/advisories/GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/twig/twig/CVE-2026-46640.yaml", "https://symfony.com/cve-2026-46640", "https://github.com/vladko312/extras/blob/main/CVE-2026-46640.py", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/twigphp/Twig/security-advisories/GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/twigphp/Twig", "summary": "Twig: Arbitrary PHP code execution via `_self.(<string>)` macro-reference compilation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-05T20:33:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-45vw-wh46-2vx8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "3.26.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "twig/twig"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 3.15.0, < 3.26.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Twig: Arbitrary PHP code execution via `_self.(<string>)` macro-reference compilation
